chapter_title.en: Chapter 116 – Disbursement of the Dirhams coated over

text: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَمَّنْ حَدَّثَهُ عَنْ جَمِيلٍ عَنْ حَرِيزِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ قَالَ كُنْتُ عِنْدَ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فَدَخَلَ عَلَيْهِ قَوْمٌ مِنْ أَهْلِ سِجِسْتَانَ فَسَأَلُوهُ عَنِ الدَّرَاهِمِ الْمَحْمُولِ عَلَيْهَا فَقَالَ لَا بَأْسَ إِذَا كَانَ جَوَازاً لِمِصْرٍ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from the one who narrated it, from Jameel, from Hareyz Bin Abdullah who said,

‘I was in the presence of Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, so a group of people came over to him<sup>asws</sup> from the inhabitants of Sijistan. So they asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the Dirhams coated over. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no problem when it was licenced (currency) in a city’.
